title: Scanning Electron Microscopy Observations of Pseudomonas sp.
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cn5n8","text":"This protocol outlines a detailed method for preparing Pseudomonas sp. for scanning electron microscopy (SEM). A combination of glutaraldehyde fixation, ethanol dehydration, dual-step cryopreservation (propane and liquid nitrogen), and freeze-drying ensures the preservation of bacterial ultrastructure. Gold sputter coating enhances conductivity, allowing high-resolution SEM imaging. This method is optimized to avoid morphological distortions and ensure structural clarity during imaging.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":55,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"edkfh","text":"Ensure all steps involving biohazardous material, including bacterial cultures and glutaraldehyde fixation, are performed in a certified biosafety cabinet (BSC).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"94see","text":"Always wear appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) including lab coat, gloves, and safety goggles.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1502j","text":"Handle glutaraldehyde, ethanol, liquid nitrogen, and liquid propane in well-ventilated areas or chemical fume hoods due to their toxic, flammable, or cryogenic nature.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8c58g","text":"All fixatives and waste solvents must be disposed of according to institutional hazardous waste protocols.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fdplr","text":"Ensure samples are never exposed to air during dehydration and freezing steps to avoid shrinkage or structural distortion.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ahutc","text":"Operate the sputter coater and SEM only after receiving proper training and under supervision if necessary.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f74r4","text":"Always verify that the freeze-dryer and SEM chamber are pre-cooled and cleaned before use to ensure sample integrity.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"cegk9","text":"Ensure that all reagents, including 4% glutaraldehyde at 4°C, graded ethanol solutions, and 1× PBS, are freshly prepared and properly labeled.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cncfn","text":"Pre-chill the liquid nitrogen dewar, propane chamber, and freeze-dryer at least 30 minutes prior to use.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7elfh","text":"Double-check that conductive carbon tape, and aluminum stubs are available and contamination-free.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4t45l","text":"Confirm access to the Jeol® NeoScope® JCM 5000 SEM, and ensure that gold sputter coater is functional with sufficient gold target material.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"as2g2","text":"Review the entire protocol and conduct a dry run or mock setup to avoid workflow interruptions once biological samples are handled.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4b2u9","text":"Label all sample containers clearly before starting and maintain a detailed sample tracking sheet throughout the procedure.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"3jsco","text":"Always wear cryo-protective gloves and goggles when handling propane and LN₂.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4eao8","text":"Never seal vials tightly during cryo-transfer to avoid pressure buildup.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ek9bt","text":"Maintain ethanol immersion until freezing to avoid dehydration artifacts.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Bacterial Culture and Colony Preparation Inoculate Pseudomonas auctus JDE115 into LB lite broth. Incubate at 28°C for 24 hours. Serially dilute and plate on LB lite agar. Incubate plates for 48 hours at 28°C until ~6 mm colonies appear.

Sample Fixation Excise bacterial colonies with sterile scalpel. Transfer to glass petri dishes. Submerge in 4% glutaraldehyde in 0.1M sodium cacodylate buffer at 4°C overnight. Rinse thoroughly with 1× PBS.

Ethanol Dehydration Series Dehydrate sequentially in 5%, 10%, 25%, 50%, 75%, 90%, and 95% ethanol (15 min each). Incubate in 100% ethanol for 3 × 15 minutes. Maintain full ethanol immersion throughout.

Cryopreservation and Freeze-Drying Submerge dehydrated samples in liquid propane (held in LN₂-chilled metal holder) for ultra-rapid freezing. Immediately transfer to liquid nitrogen for solidification. Transfer frozen samples into a pre-cooled freeze-dryer (Harvest Right®) and lyophilize for 2 hours under vacuum. Note : This dual cryopreservation minimizes ice crystal formation and preserves native ultrastructure.
Gold Sputter Coating Mount dried samples onto aluminum SEM stubs with double-sided carbon tape. Sputter-coat with 90 Å of gold using EMITech® SC7620 coater.
SEM Imaging Visualize using a Jeol® NeoScope® JCM 5000 SEM at 10kV. Capture images at multiple magnifications to assess morphology and flagellar structure.
creator: Md Sahadat Ali
